**The ruling (five operator messages, one correction).** *"the awareness is not limited by ±8 only the reference horizon, so the recipes can also escalate to search for causality pattern over time"* → *"which then relates to arigraph basins which are also not limited to temporal window, they are absolute"* → *"the awareness horizon in theory has only a minimal resistance which is 16 SPO having 16×3 SPO + 16×3 Arigraph, so 'only' the top 16 out of 16 which technically is a non limit"* → *"i mean if romeo and juliet die their death doesn't suddenly become coincidental just because it isn't adjacent to the capulet drama"* → *"the benefit of Arigraph SPO is that it can be an 'absolute' trope not limited to the 16 window"* → *"and also the leiden families are not limited to the 16."*

**The defect it caught.** `standing_wave_grounded` returned `WaveGrounding::Coincidental` whenever `resolve_chain` set `escalated=true` (the chain left the `±8` window or exhausted the hop budget). That conflated **"the cause is beyond the reference horizon"** with **"there is no cause"** — the Romeo & Juliet error: a non-adjacent cause is still a cause. `dispatch_guard::GateOutcome::WaveCatch` inherited the same mislabel.

**The fix (shipped this commit).** `WaveGrounding::Coincidental` → **`WaveGrounding::Escalate`**: bound, the chain PERSISTS but leaves the `±8` reference horizon → the signal to escalate to a wider read (deep thinking over time), NOT a coincidental block. There is now **no `Coincidental` wave verdict at all** — the wave cannot decide "genuinely spurious" from the local window alone; only the escalated read can, and that is the consumer's call (consistent with `E-LOCI-CHAIN-ESCALATE-1`: the contract emits the signal, the consumer does the read). `dispatch_guard::GateOutcome::WaveCatch` → **`Escalate`** (+ `GuardVerdict.coincidental` → `escalate`, `is_wave_catch` → `is_escalate`). The recipe does not fire locally and does not hard-block — it escalates.

**The escalation ladder is relative → ABSOLUTE (this is the deep point).** The `±8` nibble is a RELATIVE pointer (offset into the local Markov window). Escalation climbs to ABSOLUTE structures, none bounded by the 16-locus window:
1. **`temporal.rs` version-range read** (`QueryReference::at`) — wider, still version/stream-relative.
2. **AriGraph SPO tropes** — an SPO fact is an ABSOLUTE trope (addressed by identity/fingerprint, `I-VSA-IDENTITIES` register-not-content): the Capulet–Montague feud is one persistent SPO fact any escalated chain reaches regardless of temporal distance. *"not limited to the temporal window, they are absolute."*
3. **Leiden families** — graph communities/basins (the `family` u24 / `part_of:is_a` rails) detected over the AriGraph are ABSOLUTE community structures, *"also not limited to the 16."*

**Minimal resistance ⇒ a non-limit.** The awareness horizon's resistance is minimal: `16×3 SPO + 16×3 AriGraph`; using "only the top 16 out of 16" is *technically a non-limit* — the local window is the cheap default read, not a capacity ceiling. Awareness is effectively unbounded; the `±8`/16 is where you START, and low-resistance escalation reaches the absolute tissue.

**Measured (`dispatch_guard_redundancy`, re-run with the corrected semantics):** the "beyond" window (chains re-extend out of `±8`) now flips **34/34 `Fires→Escalate`** (was mislabeled `Fires→WaveCatch`). The story is cleaner: single-pass binding is BLIND (fires 34/34 both windows); the wave says "these 34 have non-local causes → escalate over time / into the absolute basin," not "these 34 are hollow." The higher-confidence redundancy stands — it is now correctly named.

**Cross-ref:** `E-MARKOV-STANDING-WAVE-GATE-1` (the gate whose `Coincidental` label this corrects), `E-SUDOKU-TISSUE-WEAVE-1` (the horizontal axis this reframes: settle-local vs escalate-beyond), `E-LOCI-CHAIN-ESCALATE-1` (`resolve_chain`'s `escalated` signal, the mechanism), `E-MARKOV-TEMPORAL-STREAM-1` (temporal.rs), D-CSW-2 (basin→causal-edge, the AriGraph/Leiden absolute-basin escalation target — the pending build), `I-VSA-IDENTITIES` (SPO trope = absolute identity, not windowed content).

## 2026-07-21 — E-SUDOKU-TISSUE-WEAVE-1 — operator's architectural framing of the standing-wave gate: it is a SUDOKU PUZZLE SOLVING ITSELF on TWO ORTHOGONAL AXES (bottom-up Maslow + horizontal Markov) — that is why the tissue is 24 loci; the 24-loci tissue is BUILT FIRST, and the 34 recipes are the WEFT that weaves the cognitive tissue LAYER BY LAYER; only with the lower-layer tissues woven can the higher find the connective tissue to build on; the multihop causality chain (forward+backward) is what gives the CONFIDENCE for deep thinking

**Status:** FINDING (operator architectural framing — verified against the shipped code; NAMES the architecture the shipped pieces already realize, no new code). **Confidence:** High — every claim maps to a shipped mechanism (`dispatch_guard` two gates, `resolve_chain` signed offsets, peer `recipe_loci::carried_awareness`, the rung-ascending `loci_dispatch_order`). This SHARPENS `E-MARKOV-STANDING-WAVE-GATE-1` from "higher-confidence redundancy" to the precise mechanism: orthogonal constraint intersection.

**The standing wave = a Sudoku puzzle solving itself.** It is a CONSTRAINT-SATISFACTION FIXPOINT, not a single pass. `standing_wave_grounded` runs `resolve_chain` at hop budgets `1..=passes` and settles when the budgets AGREE (not escalated) — that agreement IS the puzzle reaching self-consistency, the same way a Sudoku is solved when every constraint is mutually satisfied. No cell (locus) is grounded alone; it is grounded when its constraints intersect to a unique answer.

**TWO ORTHOGONAL constraint axes (this is what the two `dispatch_guard` gates ARE — not two redundant measures of one thing):**
- **VERTICAL / bottom-up / Maslow** — the rung ladder (`loci_rung` 0..6, Temporal=0 … Kausal/Contradiction=6). *"only with the lower layer tissues the higher can find the connective tissue to build on."* This is `carried_awareness` (lower-rung groundings read UP the climb) + single-pass BINDING in rung-ascending `loci_dispatch_order`: a higher-rung recipe anchors onto already-grounded lower-rung loci. You cannot ground the apex (Kausal/Contradiction, rung-6, ICR #31 counterfactual) without the lower context tissue woven first — the connective tissue must exist to build on.
- **HORIZONTAL** — the Markov MULTIHOP CAUSALITY chain (`resolve_chain` across the ±8 window, escalating to `temporal.rs` when it leaves). *"the multihop causality chain gives the confidence for deep thinking and forward backward logical propagation of meta awareness."* The chain is BIDIRECTIONAL by construction: `resolve_chain` follows the signed offset `∈[−8,+7]`, so it propagates both forward (positive → cause→effect, prediction) and backward (negative → effect→antecedent, abduction/diagnosis) — the SIGN is the orientation (A9 `cause()` forward / `antecedent()` backward). Deeper hop budget = deeper thinking; the standing-wave settlement across budgets IS the confidence.

**Why the tissue is 24 loci.** The 24 loci are the WOVEN FABRIC where the two axes cross — each locus is constrained BOTH vertically (its rung + its lower-layer dependencies) AND horizontally (its multihop chain, forward and backward). 16 named (§2.9) + 8 reserved (RESERVE-DON'T-RECLAIM). The 24 is a 2-D tissue, not a flat list — the Sudoku grid.

**Build order: the 24 tissue FIRST, then the 34 recipes WEAVE it layer by layer.** The 24-loci `CausalWitnessFacet` tissue is the WARP/substrate — built and self-computing (`witness_fabric::elect_peers`/`resolve_chain`). The 34 recipes are the WEFT: dispatched in rung-ascending order, each grounds its loci and its grounded layer becomes the connective tissue the next layer up builds on. **The rung-ascending dispatch IS the weave order.** `dispatch_guard::guard` (binding ∧ standing-wave) is one cell's 2-axis check within the weave; the recipe ladder over the real substrate (rung-ascending) is the loom.

**What this sharpens in `E-MARKOV-STANDING-WAVE-GATE-1`:** the two gates are the two ORTHOGONAL Sudoku axes (vertical Maslow binding × horizontal Markov chain), whose intersection is the UNIQUE grounding — that is *why* the composition is higher-confidence: orthogonal constraints intersect to a solution, they do not merely agree (agreement-averaging would be redundancy). The measured 34/34 `Fires→WaveCatch` flip is exactly a Sudoku row constraint being BLIND to what a column constraint sees: single-pass binding cannot see horizontal persistence, so the wave's catch is orthogonal information, not a louder echo.

**Code status: no new code — this NAMES the architecture the shipped pieces already realize.** `dispatch_guard` (binding ∧ wave) = the 2-axis cell check; `resolve_chain`'s signed offsets = the forward/backward propagation; peer `recipe_loci::carried_awareness` = the vertical connective-tissue climb; `loci_dispatch_order` (rung-ascending) = the weave order. The next BUILD is the loom itself — the 34-recipe ladder weaving the real 24-loci tissue over `temporal.rs`, rung by rung (D-CSW-1 leg-2 / the recipe ladder over the real substrate). **Cross-ref:** `E-MARKOV-STANDING-WAVE-GATE-1` (the gate this frames), `E-WITNESS-FABRIC-1` (`resolve_chain` the horizontal axis), `E-RECIPE-LOCI-CONVERGENCE-1` (peer `carried_awareness`/`loci_rung` the vertical axis), `E-MARKOV-TEMPORAL-STREAM-1` (the stream the wave reads), D-CSW-1 (the standing wave), `causal_witness` (the 24-loci tissue).

## 2026-07-21 — E-MARKOV-STANDING-WAVE-GATE-1 — operator ruling: the recipe grounding gate is the MULTIPASS MARKOV STANDING WAVE, never a coarse scalar pre-filter — "since we agreed to literally resolve the Markov chain, building a coarse filter is an insult to my intelligence." MEASURED: single-pass structural binding is BLIND to causal-vs-coincidental (fires 34/34 identically on both windows); the standing wave DISCRIMINATES (flips 34/34 Fires→WaveCatch). That is the honest higher-confidence redundancy; the earlier scalar `nan_disqualifier` gate was a tautological SUBSET of the organ, dropped as a grounding gate.

**Status:** SHIPPED-MECHANISM (algebra unit-proven) + FINDING (the redundancy measurement). **Confidence:** High — the discrimination is MEASURED on the real 34 recipes over two hand-built windows that differ ONLY in chain structure (no planted magnitudes; the loci are pointers, the offsets are the only varied bytes). Deliverables: `contract::dispatch_guard` (new module, 4 tests) + `witness_fabric::{standing_wave_grounded, WaveGrounding}` (+ tests → contract 998 green, clippy clean) + `examples/dispatch_guard_redundancy` (4 gates green) + `jc/examples/rung_divergence_reliability` (jc battery, 3 gates green).

**The operator's correction (the headline).** The prior session framed the redundant grounding gate as `nan_disqualifier` (scalar Axis-A over the aggregate `ThoughtCtx`) ∧ `loci_disqualifier` (24-loci Axis-B organ). Measurement showed that pair is ASYMMETRIC subsumption — 109 organ-only catches, 0 scalar-only — because the ctx is PROJECTED FROM the witness, so the scalar is a strictly coarser read of the same organ (a tautological subset, not confidence-adding). The operator rejected the scalar-as-gate outright: the text is read ~90% as the `temporal.rs` sorted Markov stream (`E-MARKOV-TEMPORAL-STREAM-1`) and the workspace LITERALLY resolves the Markov chain (the D-CSW-1 standing wave), so gating "is this recipe grounded?" on a coarse scalar shadow when the literal Markov resolver is right there is a degenerate approximation. **The scalar path is dropped as a grounding gate** (kept only as `GuardVerdict::scalar_flag`, a degenerate optional sanity flag for a non-witness ctx source — "never gates grounding here").

**The honest redundant pair (two DIFFERENT resolutions of the SAME organ, not two coarseness tiers):**
- **Single-pass structural binding** (`recipe_loci::loci_disqualifier`) — is every required locus BOUND (nonzero, placed in the ±8 window)?
- **Multipass Markov standing wave** (`witness_fabric::standing_wave_grounded`) — does every required locus PERSIST across the standing wave (settle to a stable target as the hop budget 1..=passes grows, via `resolve_chain`) rather than being a coincidental co-occurrence? Settles (two budgets agree, not escalated) → `Causal`; escalates/unresolved → `Coincidental`; unbound → `Unbound`.

These are genuinely independent: a locus can be BOUND (passes single-pass) yet COINCIDENTAL (fails the wave) — a causally-hollow binding. `GateOutcome::WaveCatch` names exactly that cell — the wave's independent catch, which the single-pass gate would have fired. That is real higher-confidence redundancy (causal vs merely-present), the OPPOSITE of a coarse pre-filter.

**Measured (`dispatch_guard_redundancy`, two windows, same rich locus set — every named locus bound, differing ONLY in chain structure):** single-pass binding fires **34/34 on BOTH** windows (blind to persistence — a coarse gate's ceiling); + the standing wave, the causal window (chains terminate → settle) fires **34/34 Causal** while the coincidental window (chains re-extend out of ±8, never settle) fires **0/34, WaveCatch 34/34**. Verdict flips **34/34 Fires→WaveCatch** between the two windows — a coarse pre-filter gives 0. Gates: G1 single-pass blind (identical both windows), G2 wave flips >0, G3 no false blocks on the causal window (fires == single-pass), G4 wave blocks all the single-pass would fire on the coincidental window. All green.

**The validity/reliability answer (`rung_divergence_reliability`, the jc battery on the operator's tautology-vs-confidence question).** For the RUNG scales (`recipe_dispatch::rung` inference-COST 1..9 vs `recipe_loci::loci_rung` organ-DEPTH 0..6): Pearson +0.337, Spearman +0.343, ICC(2,1) +0.344, ICC(3,1) +0.337, **Cronbach α +0.504**, order disorder 34.4% → **DISTINCT FACETS** (the α≈0.4–0.7 middle regime — neither tautology α≳0.8 nor orthogonal α≲0.2; cf. awareness tenants α 0.448 keep-both). So the two RUNGS combine to genuine higher-confidence redundancy (cost and depth are different information), while the two GATES (scalar vs organ) were asymmetric subsumption — DIFFERENT redundancy verdicts, both honest: **measure each, never assume symmetry.** The Jirak weak-dependence caveat (`I-NOISE-FLOOR-JIRAK`) applies to any σ-significance framing of these coefficients; the verdict here is regime-classification, not a σ-threshold claim.

**Composition (`dispatch_guard::guard`).** `guard(ctx, window, focal_idx, id, passes)` composes the two gates: gate 1 = `loci_disqualifier` (single-pass); gate 2 = `standing_wave_grounded` per required locus, only when gate 1 passes (don't double-report). Reads only PUBLIC APIs of the peer's `recipe_loci` (`loci_disqualifier`, `required_loci`) + my `witness_fabric` (`standing_wave_grounded`) — edits neither peer module (the cross-session division of labor: I own the composing gate, the peer owns escalation-internal to `recipe_loci`).

**Cross-ref:** `E-RECIPE-LOCI-CONVERGENCE-1` (the (b) `fully_grounded` follow-up this realizes — corrected: the composition is binding ∧ standing-wave, NOT scalar ∧ organ), `E-WITNESS-FABRIC-1` (`resolve_chain`, the wave's per-budget resolver + the `escalated` signal), `E-MARKOV-TEMPORAL-STREAM-1` (the temporal.rs stream the wave reads), `E-META-UNCERTAINTY-IS-MUL-1` + `I-NOISE-FLOOR-JIRAK` (the reliability lens), D-CSW-1 (the standing wave), `materialize.rs:82-88` (the NaN defect the scalar gate was meant to guard — now guarded by `dispatch_mode` upstream, not by the scalar in `dispatch_guard`).

## 2026-07-21 — E-RECIPE-LOCI-CONVERGENCE-1 — cross-session audit (my #782/#783 vs the peer session's #784 `recipe_loci` "Door C"): CONVERGENT, not colliding — recipe_loci is the ORGAN-GATED dispatch half that pairs with my ORGAN-INPUT half, and `witness_fabric`→`recipe_loci` is a clean producer→consumer chain. ONE measured tension: two rung definitions dispatch 38% of recipe-pairs in a different order (organ-depth vs inference-cost — both valid, resolved by the peer's ruling)

**Status:** FINDING (cross-session integration audit, operator-requested "check for collisions/overlaps/synergies"). **Confidence:** High — the divergence is MEASURED, not asserted. Both PRs merged clean (no compile/name collision; `dispatch_mode`, `witness_fabric`, `recipe_loci` all coexist in lib.rs). Scope: my `dispatch_mode`(#782) + `causal_witness`/`recipe_substrate`/`recipe_dispatch`(#780) + `witness_fabric`(#783) vs peer `recipe_loci`(#784).

**SYNERGIES (the dominant relationship):**
1. **Two halves of ONE #780-close.** `recipe_substrate` wired the organs into the INPUT (the projected ctx, Axis-B input side); `recipe_loci` (Door C) wires the organ into the DISPATCH GATE (Axis-B gate side). Neither duplicates the other — together they close the audit's "0/34 read a real organ" on both the input and the gate.
2. **`witness_fabric` → `recipe_loci` is a clean producer→consumer chain.** My `elect_peers`/`resolve_chain` COMPUTE and bind the loci from the window; `recipe_loci::loci_disqualifier`/`is_grounded` GATE dispatch on whether they are bound. Fabric = "how loci get bound"; Door C = "what fires once bound." Zero overlap.
3. **recipe_loci builds ON my `recipe_dispatch`** — reuses the 1..=34 id space, cross-refs `dispatch_order`, explicitly mirrors `nan_disqualifier` as its 24-dim analog `loci_disqualifier`. Clean layering, not a fork.

**OVERLAPS / TENSIONS (measured):**
1. **TWO rung definitions → 38% divergent dispatch order.** `recipe_dispatch::rung` (Tier + inference-escalation, 1..9) vs `recipe_loci::loci_rung` (`max(locus_rung)` = organ-need-depth, 0..6). MEASURED: **213/561 recipe-pairs (38%) dispatch in a different order**; 12/34 disagree apex-vs-not — BUT **both agree ICR#31 is last** (the counterfactual apex is stable). They measure genuinely different things: inference COST-to-run vs organ DEPTH-required. The peer session already RULED organ-derived canonical for dispatch, mine demoted to a "documented cross-check" (`loci_rung` doc). This is a clean resolution — but the 38% divergence means the two ladders are **NOT interchangeable**; a consumer must pick one deliberately.
2. **TWO disqualifiers, no combined gate.** `nan_disqualifier` (scalar ThoughtCtx checklist) + `loci_disqualifier` (organ witness loci). A recipe is TRULY dispatchable iff BOTH pass (scalar grounded AND organ bound). No `fully_grounded(ctx, witness, id)` composing them exists yet.

**COLLISIONS:** none hard. One SOFT: "what rung is recipe X at?" now has two answers — do NOT force-align them (a future session's tempting "dedup" would destroy real information: cost vs depth are both valid axes).

**Recommended follow-ups (small, operator-gated):** (a) `dispatch_mode::Sweep` should elect `recipe_loci::loci_ladder` (Door C, organ) when the witness is present, else `recipe_dispatch::ladder` (scalar) — wiring the router to the organ ladder; (b) a combined `fully_grounded` = `nan_disqualifier.is_none() && loci_disqualifier.is_none()` (the Axis-A ∧ Axis-B gate); (c) a one-line canon note that the 38%-divergent rung orders are intentional (organ-depth canonical for dispatch, inference-cost the cross-check). **Cross-ref:** `E-RECIPE-SUBSTRATE-WIRING-1` (#780 Axis-B), `E-DISORDER-GATE-1` (#782 the router), `E-WITNESS-FABRIC-1` (#783 the loci producer), `recipe_loci` #784 (Door C), `E-LADDER-UNSHADOWS-SELECTOR-1` (the Door A/B framing recipe_loci extends to Door C).

## 2026-07-21 — E-WITNESS-FABRIC-1 — SHIPPED-MECHANISM (Tier-3 of the expansion queue): the A9 witness tenant becomes SELF-COMPUTING — quorum/contradiction loci elected from a WINDOW of real peer rows (agreement = converge on the SAME ABSOLUTE EVENT, not the same offset), loci chains followed with a hop budget that ESCALATES to a temporal.rs version-range read rather than widening the i4, and a persisted contradiction recognized as an OPINION. Corpus falsifier registered CONJECTURE (no planted integers)

**Status:** SHIPPED-MECHANISM (algebra unit-proven) + CONJECTURE (the real-text claim). **Confidence:** High for the algebra (7 unit tests, incl. the same-event-vs-same-offset distinction); the claim that fabric-computed quorum MATCHES real coreference on real text is deliberately UNPROVEN — a hand-built register probe would be planted integers (operator-forbidden), so the falsifier is the Aesop corpus and it is registered, not faked. Deliverable: `contract::witness_fabric` (+7 tests → 983 green, clippy clean). Bundles the three Tier-3 candidates into ONE module (they all operate on a slice of `(position, register)` rows — functions, never a materialized `W×W` struct, per the council's kill of `QuorumFabric`).

**E-QUORUM-FABRIC-1 (`elect_peers`) — the quorum/contradiction loci computed, not hand-set.** For a focal row in a window, `absolute_agreement` counts the content loci (the 14 named minus the two social ones — no self-reference) on which two rows **converge on the same absolute event** (`pos_a + off_a == pos_b + off_b`; plan §2.9 "converge on the SAME context events" — this CORRECTS the co-located-offset assumption of `agrees_at`). Quorum = the max-agreement peer; Contradiction = a peer that shares context but points its **Kausal** cause at a DIFFERENT event (a preserved dissent, not mere unrelatedness). Offsets clamp to the `±8` window; peers outside it are not electable. This replaces `recipe_substrate`'s hand-set quorum/contradiction with a value READ FROM the fabric of the window — thinking as agreement topology.

**E-LOCI-CHAIN-ESCALATE-1 (`resolve_chain`) — the ±8 nibble never widens; it ESCALATES.** Follows a locus offset to a peer; if that peer re-binds the same locus, hops again (the register following its own nibbles, `E-L9-REAL-TEXT-1`), up to `max_hops`. When the chain leaves the `±8` window OR exhausts the budget, it sets `escalated=true` — the SIGNAL that a `temporal.rs` version-range read (`QueryReference::at`) is required. The contract emits the signal; the CONSUMER does the read (no i4 widening, no new witness variant). **This is the `temporal.rs` seam that also unblocks D-CSW-1 leg-2** (the standing-wave probe's real-temporal.rs binding).

**E-CONTRADICTION-OPINION-1 (`is_opinion` / `opinion_strength`) — a stance is a persisted contradiction.** An opinion = a row whose Contradiction locus stays bound across EVERY revision (committed-contradiction persistence as first-class epistemic state; "opinions are committed contradictions preserved, not resolved" — CLAUDE.md P-1 §3). A contradiction that appears then drops is transient noise, not a stance. Staunen×Wisdom stays strictly on the stakes (temperature) side — the persistence is the logic.

**Registered falsifier (the promotion gate, CONJECTURE-until-run):** extend `jc/examples/l9_loci_real_text` on the SAME 3 Aesop fables (real COCA table, real `resolved[]` coreference): build per-event registers, run `elect_peers` over each `±8` window, and gate that fabric-computed quorum separates gold-ambiguous from gold-resolved sites AND that `resolve_chain` recovers the known 9-back kausal miss via escalation. KILL if fabric quorum shows no dissonance separation vs the hand-set baseline. Until run, the real-text claim stays CONJECTURE; the algebra is FINDING. **Cross-ref:** `E-THINKING-EXPANSION-QUEUE-1` (Tier 3), `E-L9-REAL-TEXT-1` (the chaining this formalizes + the corpus), `E-RECIPE-SUBSTRATE-WIRING-1` (the hand-set quorum this replaces), `E-MARKOV-TEMPORAL-STREAM-1` (the version-range read escalation targets), D-CSW-1 leg-2 (the temporal.rs seam shared).

## 2026-07-21 — E-DISORDER-GATE-1 — SHIPPED (Tier-1 of the expansion queue): the pre-dispatch mode router lands on a CODE-VERIFIED DEFECT — `select_tactic` reads a NaN/ungrounded `free_energy` as the LOWEST-surprise "routine" band (`NaN >= x` is always false → the `else` arm), so an undefined awareness state is dispatched as a calm one; the `dispatch_mode` router runs FIRST and routes it to `FieldGather`

**Status:** FINDING + SHIPPED (Tier-1 landing of `E-THINKING-EXPANSION-QUEUE-1`; the dispatch-mode-architect lens's mechanical core, not the full-Cynefin ceremony). **Confidence:** High — the defect is reproduced against the REAL shipped `select_tactic` on a REAL projected `SubstrateView` (not a planted scalar); the fix is a pure pre-gate. Deliverables: `contract::dispatch_mode` (+6 tests → 982 green, clippy clean) + `disorder_gate_probe` (5 gates green).

**The defect (Leg A, reproduced on real code):** `materialize::select_tactic` (materialize.rs:82-88) chooses the reasoning mechanism by `free_energy >= 0.66 → StructuralDivergence / >= 0.33 → TruthAwareInference / else → ParallelIndependence` ("routine parallel work"). Because **`NaN >= x` is always `false`**, an *ungrounded* ctx — one a missing tenant could not ground, so `recipe_substrate::project` emits `NaN` free_energy + empty candidates — silently falls into the `else` and dispatches **#1 RTE (ParallelIndependence, routine)**. An undefined state is read as the calmest possible one, exactly backwards: an ungrounded row should GATHER fields, not execute routine content reasoning on noise.

**The fix (`dispatch_mode`, Cynefin's honest mechanical core):** a pre-dispatch router computed per dispatch, never stored. Cynefin's own question — *"what is the relationship between cause and effect?"* — IS a read of the awareness state, no new vocabulary: **Confused** (any required marker NaN / no candidates → cause↔effect UNKNOWABLE) → `FieldGather`; **Chaotic** (BLOCK gate + high surprise → NONE) → `Stabilize`; **Complex** (bound contradiction → only-in-retrospect) → `Sweep`, contradiction preserved; **Clear** (FLOW + low surprise + no contradiction → obvious) → `Saccade`; **Complicated** (else → knowable by analysis) → `Sweep`. It sequences the TWO shipped dispatch modes (`select_tactic` saccade / `recipe_dispatch::ladder` sweep) plus two honest degenerate arms — zero new recipes (34-lock), reads only LOGICAL markers (never qualia).

**The MUL tie-in realized (`E-META-UNCERTAINTY-IS-MUL-1`):** a `DkPosition::MountStupid` (felt≫demonstrated competence — the Dunning-Kruger novice) **VETOES the `Clear` election** → downgrades it to `Complicated`/Sweep. "You feel it's obvious; you are not competent to saccade — so analyze." Circle-of-competence composing in at the mode level by READING MUL's already-computed position, not a new layer — the operator's "map don't rebuild" made concrete: the router calls MUL, it does not reimplement reversibility/DK.

**Gates (all green, registered before run):** G1 defect reproduced (NaN→routine ParallelIndependence); G2 the router sends the SAME ungrounded ctx to `FieldGather`/Confused not routine; G3 domain distribution non-degenerate (4 distinct domains on the real projected states); G4 MountStupid veto downgrades Clear→Complicated; G5 election is causal (grounded vs ungrounded elect different modes). **Named-disagreement resolution recorded:** the full 5-domain Cynefin classifier the rung4-macro-smith lens wanted is NOT built — the mechanical core (Confused/Chaotic/Complex + the two shipped modes) covers it; the ceremony was pruned per the dispatch-mode-architect lens ruling.

**Deferred within Tier 1 (queued, not built here):** E-RESTFAIL-ESCALATE-1 (saccade→sweep on measured `Trace.rested==false`), E-ANYTIME-LADDER-1 (Jirak stopping rule / budget continuum) — both compose ON this router. **Cross-ref:** `E-THINKING-EXPANSION-QUEUE-1` (Tier 1), `E-META-UNCERTAINTY-IS-MUL-1` (the DK veto), `E-LADDER-UNSHADOWS-SELECTOR-1` (the two modes it chooses between), `E-RECIPE-SUBSTRATE-WIRING-1` (the projection that emits the NaN this guards), `materialize.rs:82-88` (the defect site).

## 2026-07-21 — E-META-UNCERTAINTY-IS-MUL-1 — the cc-thinking-skills META-UNCERTAINTY cluster (reversibility, margin-of-safety, inversion, cynefin-inputs, circle-of-competence, bounded-rationality) is ALREADY the shipped MUL contract, field-for-field — MAP it, never rebuild it; only the CONTENT-reasoning skills compose rung-3 recipes, and only the mode-router + counterfactual-pricing are genuinely missing

**Status:** FINDING (operator insight — *"reversibility / margin-of-safety / inversion sound directly related to MUL"* — verified against source + confirmed independently by 3 council lenses). **Confidence:** High — the mapping is a literal field correspondence, not an analogy.

**The correspondence (`contract::mul::SituationInput` already carries the skills as INPUTS):** **reversibility** = `reversibility_requirement: f64` → `GateDecision {Flow=two-way/proceed, Hold=one-way/deliberate, Block=need-input}`. **margin-of-safety** = `max_acceptable_damage` + `sandbox_available` + `allostatic_load` → the gate's risk arm (buffer sized by breach cost, exactly the skill's procedure). **inversion / circle-of-competence** = `felt_competence` vs `demonstrated_competence` → `is_unskilled_overconfident()` = the Dunning-Kruger `DkPosition::MountStupid`. **cynefin** = `complexity_ratio` + `interdependency_density` → the classifier inputs. **socratic / go-meta** = `CompassDecision {StaySurface, GoMeta}`. So the meta-uncertainty skill CLUSTER is not a rung-4 macro layer to build — it is MUL, shipped. Building a "reversibility macro" would duplicate `reversibility_requirement` + `GateDecision`.

**The three-tier reshape this forces (was one flat "rung-4 macros" bucket):** **Tier 0 — meta-uncertainty cluster → MUL (zero new code, MAP only).** **Tier 1 — the ONE missing connective piece: a MUL-driven mode router** (nothing chooses between #780's shipped saccade/sweep modes). **Tier 2 — content-reasoning skills → genuine rung-4 macros** composing rung-3 recipes (first-principles≈HTD+ETD+MCT, second-order≈RTE+TCA, socratic≈MCP+SSR, steel-manning≈CDI+CR, scientific-method≈ICR+SDD+MCP). **Tier 3 — true gaps with no home: counterfactual PRICING** (opportunity-cost/regret — ICR builds the world, nothing values it), fermi-estimation, lindy-effect. Same lesson as this whole session, one layer up: the recipes already existed (wire, don't rebuild) → the meta-uncertainty skills already exist as MUL (map, don't rebuild).

**Cross-ref:** `E-THINKING-SKILLS-ARE-RUNG-4-MACROS-1` (superseded in part — its "reversibility/margin/inversion as rung-4" mappings are corrected here to MUL), `mul.rs::{SituationInput, DkPosition, GateDecision, CompassDecision}`, `E-THINKING-EXPANSION-QUEUE-1` (below — the ranked build queue), `persona-vs-rung-ladder.md`.

## 2026-07-21 — E-RECIPE-LOCI-ORGAN-GATE-1 — Door C: the recipe dispatch gate keyed to the REAL 24-loci causal-witness organ, closing #780 Axis B on the dispatch path; the Maslow rung climb CARRIES lower-rung awareness up (anti-rediscovery) and higher thinking PRUNES lower-related

**Status:** FINDING (this session; `recipe_loci` module + `recipe_loci_walk` probe, additive/zero-dep, nothing existing touched). **Confidence:** High for the mechanism (shipped + 10 unit tests + 4 measured probe gates green); the A1-basin-6 composition is documented-not-wired (honest next step, not claimed).

**What #780 left open (the precise gap).** #780's Axis-B audit measured that **34/34 recipe kernels read ONLY the 8-field scalar proxy — 0 read a real organ**. #780 wired the organs INTO the ctx (`SubstrateView`) but the DISPATCH gate (`recipe_dispatch::ladder` NaN-check, and the two shipped reach-doors) stayed scalar/style. This entry supplies the missing half: a dispatch gate keyed to the live `CausalWitnessFacet` 24 loci.

**Door C — the organ gate (complements, does not replace, the two shipped doors).** `docs/NARS_RECIPES_DISPATCH.md` §7 already reaches 34/34 by **Door A** (style→mechanism fan, the wide door) + **Door B** (surprise selector `select_tactic`, the narrow door — MEASURED here at **7/34** distinct over a 270-ctx sweep, tightening the doc's "8"). Both gate on style/mechanism/scalar-surprise; NEITHER reads the organ. **Door C** (`recipe_loci::reachable`) reaches a recipe by GROUNDING its 24-dimension loci — the organ decides, not the style label. It does NOT raise the count above Door A's 34 (measured: fully-bound witness → 34); its contribution is making reachability CONTINGENT ON THE REAL ORGAN. Each recipe's `required_loci(id)` is a documented classification grounded in the recipe's own `recipes.rs::substrate` string (RCR/TCA/IDR/ICR read `Kausal`; MCT/HKF read S/P/O; SMAD/SPP read `Quorum`+`Contradiction`; …).

**Carry (anti-exponential rediscovery, #777 "orientation for free").** The 24-loci register is READ, not consumed, across the whole rung walk, so a dimension grounded for a shallow recipe stays grounded for every deeper one (`carried_awareness`, MEASURED monotone non-decreasing 4→14 loci up the ascent). The cause is placed once at its rung and read by all higher rungs — observational causal discovery pays super-exponentially to RE-search it each step; here the apex reads the carried `Kausal`/`BasinAnchor`/`Antecedent` locus. The rung level occupies ZERO stored bytes (#778) — carried by WHICH loci are bound, named in the shipped `RungLevel` Maslow-pyramid vocabulary (`rung_level`), climbed by the shipped `RungElevator`. **The rung ORDER is itself organ-derived** (`loci_rung(id)` = `max(locus_rung(l))` over the required dimensions — a recipe is as deep as its deepest organ), so the WHOLE walk (order AND gate) is 24-based, not a static Tier+inference table: ICR #31 lands at the Counterfactual apex (rung 6) BECAUSE `Kausal`/`Contradiction` are apex dimensions, not because a table said 9 (the static `recipe_dispatch::rung` is kept only as a documented cross-check — the `loci_rung_is_organ_derived` test asserts they differ). This answers "still brute-force popcount, or 24-based?": the gate is per-specific-dimension (never a count), and now the order is too; the legacy scalar `nan_disqualifier` popcount path remains beside it, unchanged (#780).

**Prune (higher thinking subsumes lower-related).** The dual of carry: a reachable recipe is dropped from active dispatch when a strictly-higher-rung reachable recipe requires a strict superset of its dimensions (`active_after_prune`, MEASURED 34 reachable → 18 active at the apex; RTE #1 `[MeaningLevel]` pruned by SSR #21 `[Contradiction,MeaningLevel]`; apex ICR #31 never pruned). Carry + prune = the Maslow economy: lower groundings ride UP, subsumed lower work drops OUT.

**The shape it clarifies (witness vs awareness; CE64 vs V3).** The **witness** (`CausalWitnessFacet`) is POINTER-ONLY — 24×i4 = WHERE each dimension's filler sits (0=NaN). **Actual awareness** = witness ⊕ rung (elected ClassView, zero bytes) ⊕ the last-6 `part_of:is_a` NaN-skipped (the A1 `SpoFacet` L1 `6×(8:8)` taxonomy ancestry the witness's `BasinAnchor` only POINTS at) ⊕ truth+direction (A3+A6) ⊕ higher-prunes-lower. This IS the V3 vs **CausalEdge64** move: CE64 crams *(what × how-confidently × where-in-time)* into 64 fixed bits (the `I-LEGACY-API-FEATURE-GATED` pain); V3 DECOMPOSES that into full-width, content-blind facet readings over the 12-byte register (`6×2` = the `6×(8:8)` rails; `24×i4` = the loci) — the witness carries WHERE, A3/A6 carry WHAT/HOW, the ClassView elects the reading. Door C gates on the witness (the minimal organ); wiring the A1-basin-6 chain into the gate is the documented next composition (a sibling reading, no new storage).

**Cross-ref:** `E-LADDER-UNSHADOWS-SELECTOR-1` (the two shipped modes Door C sits beside), `E-RECIPE-SELECTOR-REACHABILITY-1` (the 8/34 — measured 7 here), `E-RECIPE-SUBSTRATE-WIRING-1` (#780, the ctx-side organ wiring this completes on the dispatch side), `E-FOVEATED-AWARENESS-1` (the Maslow-pyramid RungLevel vocabulary + `docs/NARS_RECIPES_DISPATCH.md` §7), `E-H268-REPLAYABLE-TILE-1` (one register, N readings), `causal_witness.rs` / `awareness_facet.rs` / `cognitive_shader::{RungLevel,RungElevator}`. Files: `recipe_loci.rs` (module + 10 tests), `examples/recipe_loci_walk.rs` (4 measured gates).

## 2026-07-21 — E-RECIPE-SUBSTRATE-WIRING-1 — the 34 NARS recipes MEASURE THEIR CLAIMS but on a scalar PROXY, not the real organ (28/34 sound on the proxy; the weakness is SUBSTRATE-WIRING, not recipe composition) — so the three real tenants are wired in: A9 CausalWitnessFacet (24 loci = third #729 register reading) + SPO + qualia → a rung-ordered, NaN-gated CAUSAL LADDER keyed by inference type

**Status:** FINDING + WIRING (this session; operator-steered live). **Confidence:** High for the audit (it exercises the REAL shipped `recipe_kernels::kernel(id)`, not a reimpl); the projection metrics (pair_similarity) are a documented zero-dep stand-in for the ndarray 256×256 CAM-PQ table (follow-up). Deliverables: `causal_witness.rs`, `recipe_substrate.rs`, `recipe_dispatch.rs` (3 new contract modules, +18 tests → 970 green, clippy clean) + 3 probes (`recipe_claim_audit`, `loci_recipe_relevance`, `recipe_ladder_over_substrate`, all gates green). Gates registered before each run.

**The root-cause audit (`recipe_claim_audit`, real kernels on positive vs control ctx).** Two measured axes. Axis A (recipe-side realization): **12 MEASURES + 16 REALIZES = 28/34 sound** on the proxy; **2 INERT** (CAS #8, ETD #22 — compute-then-DISCARD bugs: `_level`/clone never written back) + **4 CONSTANT** (ARE/ZCF/ICR/HKF — exact algebraic identities but INPUT-INDEPENDENT, hardcoded `u32`). Axis B (substrate grounding): **34/34 kernels consume ONLY the 8-field `ThoughtField` scalar-proxy basis — 0 read a real organ**, exactly as the module doc concedes ("richer substrate slots in behind the same trait later"). **Verdict to the operator's question:** the recipe *compositions* are sound; the dominant weakness is SUBSTRATE-side — the recipes run on hand-set scalars, never the SPO 2³ / CAM-PQ 4096² / temporal.rs Markov / VSA / deepnsm organs they name. The gap is WIRING.

**The wiring (closes the gap).** (1) **`causal_witness::CausalWitnessFacet`** — the A9 "24 edges": a reading of the 12-byte content-blind register as 24 signed `i4` loci (`G24N4`), each a context POINTER (`∈[−8,+7]`, `0`=unbound) into the ±8 Markov window. It is the **THIRD ClassView reading** of the SAME register #729 shipped two of (FROZEN `12×u8`, Orchestration `6×(8:8)`) — a reading, no stored bytes, envelope-safe. 16 named loci (§2.9) + 8 reserved-empty (never padded). (2) **`recipe_substrate::SubstrateView`** projects SPO + witness + qualia into the recipe input basis. (3) **`recipe_dispatch`** orders the 34 into a rung-gated causal ladder keyed by NARS `InferenceType`.

**Operator design-locks (each enforced by a green gate).** • **Qualia is ADDITIVE and STAKES-only** — it adds to the affective `temperature` (arousal/tension/groundedness), never multiplied/gating, and NEVER touches a logical marker: swapping the qualia register moves ONLY temperature, confidence/surprise/dissonance/candidates are byte-identical ("you do not describe an epiphany's logical quality with a qualia about how it feels"; qualia "might describe stakes"). • **Causality is NOT a qualia** — the cause is the witness `Locus::Kausal` edge (logical, A9). • **Logic ← SPO + 24 witness edges; stakes ← qualia.** • **Thinking is an act of cause-and-effect** — the dispatch is a causal chain (fire→next state→next fire); the **Versuchsleitereffekt IS the Heisenberg observer effect** (measuring disturbs → each step logs its triggering cause); dispatch is a **deterministic Schrödinger collapse** (superposed awareness, recoverable by role key, no randomness); a **NaN disqualifier is an unmeasurable conjugate** (a required input the tenants can't ground → recipe skipped, `E-RELIABILITY-IS-CHECKLIST-COVERAGE` as a runtime gate); the `N≤√d/4≈32` bundle bound is the substrate's uncertainty relation, and the 24-locus witness sits safely under it.

**External validation anchors (operator-provided, NOT yet wired — out of current repo scope):** `AdaWorldAPI/NARS-Swift` (a real NARS implementation — the inference-rule oracle to validate the deduction/induction/abduction/revision/counterfactual classification against) and `InternScience`/`AdaWorldAPI/MME-Reasoning` (arXiv 2505.21327 — a multimodal-reasoning benchmark, inductive/deductive/abductive taxonomy — the eventual empirical test bed for the 34-recipe ladder). Flagged for a future `add_repo` + a benchmark probe; the inference-type map in `recipe_dispatch::inference` is the hypothesis those repos would falsify. **Theory anchor:** **PCRLLM** (arXiv 2511.08392, Tangrui Li, **Pei Wang** [NARS], Hahm et al., Temple — "Proof-Carrying Reasoning with LLMs under Stepwise Logical Constraints") is the formal frame the ladder instantiates: reasoning constrained to **single-step inferences** with explicit **premises + rule + conclusion**, verifiable against a target logic, composable across experts. A `RecipeStep` = one such proof-carrying step (its `inference` = the rule, its `trigger` = the grounded premises, the `nan_disqualifier` = the verification gate that refuses an unsupported step). **Causal-formalism anchor:** **Causal ML survey** (arXiv 2206.15475, Kaddour/Lynch/Liu/Kusner/Silva — "Causal Machine Learning: A Survey and Open Problems") formalizes the structural-causal-model ladder the witness edges instantiate: SCM structure = the `Locus::Kausal` edge, **intervention** = Pearl rung-2, **counterfactual** = rung-3 = `RecipeInference::Counterfactual` (ICR #31, SPO=0b111 apex, causal-edge `−6` mantissa). "Thinking finds cause and effect" = the survey's interventional/counterfactual reasoning read off the witness loci.

**Cross-ref:** #729 "one register, N readings" (`E-H268-REPLAYABLE-TILE-1`; A9 = the third), M20 plan §2.9 (the L9 schema this ships as a type), `E-L9-REAL-TEXT-1` (the loci validated on real text), `E-AWARENESS-TENANTS-EVOLVE-NOT-COLLAPSE-1` (the tenants this reads), `contract::nars::InferenceType` (the `to_mantissa` bridge to CausalEdge64), `E-CE64-MB-4` (ractor ownership — the write-back the ladder feeds), `I-VSA-IDENTITIES` (Test 1 = the Heisenberg bound; loci are identity pointers not content). Honest bound: `pair_similarity` is a zero-dep stand-in for the ndarray CAM-PQ table; INERT/CONSTANT tiers are input-choice-sensitive but the tiers themselves (compute-then-discard, input-independent) are structural.

## 2026-07-21 — E-PARTOF-ISA-vs-PALETTE256-1 — the two sanctioned `6×(8:8)` readings of the SAME 12 bytes are NEAR-ORTHOGONAL on real substrate (cross-reading ρ 0.035, ICC 0.006): `part_of:is_a` holds exact TAXONOMY (+0.346 same-kind separation), `palette256²` holds frequency-centroid SIMILARITY (+0.001, taxonomy-blind) — the catalogue's L1-vs-L4 split is load-bearing, not cosmetic

**Status:** FINDING — real substrate: the fable content nouns (merged `l9_loci_real_text` corpus) with real COCA-5k ranks (`palette256²` = `(rank>>8, rank&0xFF)`, freq-is-cosine distance) vs objectively-true English taxonomy (`part_of:is_a` = is_a-graph path length, the copula facts `deepnsm::spo_markov_kg` extracts via `"is"→"is_a"`). **Confidence:** High for the orthogonality direction; small vocabulary (11/16 nouns in COCA-5k) + one hand-verified real taxonomy bound the magnitudes. Deliverable: `crates/jc/examples/partof_isa_vs_palette256.rs`. Gates registered before the first run.

**The measurement (jc battery over 55 vocab pairs):** cross-reading `pearson_r 0.0098`, `spearman_ρ 0.0350`, `icc(2,1) 0.0059`, `cronbach_α 0.0187` — **near-zero agreement**. What each HOLDS, against a gold same-kind/cross-kind contrast: **`part_of:is_a` separation +0.346** (same-kind 0.671 vs cross-kind 0.324 — animals cluster with animals: it holds TAXONOMY, exact/transitive, 5 distinct path-distances); **`palette256²` separation +0.001** (same-kind 0.676 vs cross-kind 0.675 — taxonomy-blind: it holds frequency-centroid SIMILARITY, continuous, 50 distinct quantised distances). `dog`~`wolf` = is_a-close (both animals) but palette-far (different COCA ranks); a high-frequency function pair = palette-close but taxonomically unrelated.

**Why it matters:** le-contract §3 carries L1 (`part_of:is_a`) and L4 (`palette256²`) as SEPARATE sanctioned layouts of the identical 12-byte payload. This probe proves that separation is **load-bearing, not cosmetic** — the two readings are near-orthogonal axes (neither reconstructs the other), so a class that needs both "what kind" (structure) and "how similar" (metric) genuinely needs both layouts. It is the sharpest possible KEEP-BOTH result for the diverse-redundancy substrate: not "moderately different facets" (the L9 loci at α 0.448) but genuinely orthogonal — `part_of:is_a` = "what kind" (exact structure), `palette256²` = "how similar" (graded resonance). jc measured the orthogonality; it was not assumed.

**Cross-ref:** `E-L9-REAL-TEXT-1` (the sibling real-text probe + same corpus/metric), `E-AWARENESS-TENANTS-EVOLVE-NOT-COLLAPSE-1` (low agreement = keep-both, jc diagnostic never a collapse trigger), le-contract §3 L1/L4, `E-FREQ-IS-COSINE-REPLACEMENT-1` (the palette metric), `deepnsm::spo_markov_kg` (the copula is_a extractor). Honest bound: small real vocabulary; the finding is the orthogonality direction, measured not assumed.

## 2026-07-21 — E-L9-REAL-TEXT-1 — the L9 loci register run over ACTUAL TEXT is VALID against the text's own structure (antecedents 0.727, causal clauses 0.750) and the jc reliability battery is well-posed; the killer finding: real-text coreference REQUIRES loci CHAINING — the register following its own stored nibbles (+0.27 over the shipped noun-only rule)

**Status:** FINDING — real substrate end to end: three public-domain Aesop fables (natural narrative English, NOT constructed for the probe), the committed COCA table (`deepnsm/word_frequency/lemmas_5k.csv` — real ranks AND real PoS tags), the `E-FREQ-IS-COSINE` rank-distance, the shipped `spo_anaphora_nibble` agreement rule, and the tested `jc::reliability` battery (Shrout-Fleiss ICC / Cronbach / Pearson / Spearman). **Confidence:** High within scope (one short corpus; wild-corpus scale is future). Deliverable: `crates/jc/examples/l9_loci_real_text.rs`. Gates registered before the first run; never loosened.

**Validity (what the register SAYS about the text):** antecedent loci **0.727** (16/22 gold pronouns; gate ≥0.60 ✓) vs agreement-blind baseline 0.273 — agreement adds +0.18, chaining adds +0.27. KAUSAL loci **0.750** (3/4 gold causal links; gate ≥0.50 ✓; the one miss: "thought…so he snapped" — the cause verb sits 9+ events back, an honest ±8-window-tightness miss). All resolved antecedent nibbles in −8..+7, all backward. Honest misses kept as misses: extrapositional "it would be fun" (beyond the shipped pleonastic rule), "it"→river-not-meat (recency beats world knowledge), "he"→wolf-not-boy after "cried wolf" (ditto).

**The v1 KILL is the finding (recorded; gates byte-identical v1→v2):** the shipped noun-only rule scores **0.455** on real text because real text carries pronoun CHAINS ("He…he…he") — by the second hop the noun is outside ±8 and noun-only goes UNRESOLVED. v2 = **loci chaining**: an agreeing pronoun event inside the window is a valid binder, and its already-stored antecedent nibble completes the chain — **the register composing with itself**, one extra hop of the loci method, no new machinery. This is the L9 design's own mechanism validating itself on real text: the nibble edges are not just storage, they are the traversal.

**Reliability (Method A semantic-nearest vs Method B positional-nearest, per dimension; REPORTED diagnostic per evolve-not-collapse, never a collapse trigger):** temporal ICC(2,1) 0.682 · basin 0.491 · quorum 0.449 · noun-gnd 0.360 · verb-gnd **0.072** (the methods genuinely disagree on verb grounding — semantic vs positional verbs differ; a real measured direction, kept). Cronbach α over the 5-dim locality profile = **0.448** — moderate-low internal consistency ⇒ the loci dimensions measure RELATED-BUT-DISTINCT context facets, not one redundant scale — exactly what the diverse-redundancy substrate predicts (they are different facets that evolve, not duplicates to merge). Corpus coverage: 92% of tokens COCA-known.

**Fixture-spec corrections en route (mis-specs of the probe, not gate retunes; each recorded):** (1) the window unit is the EVENT stream (content n/v/j + pronouns + temporal markers + connectives — "ticks are events"), not raw words; (2) causal gold compares in LEMMA space; (3) the gold pronoun ledger is guarded by a sync assert that caught its own omission. **Cross-ref:** M20 plan §2.9 (the L9 schema this instruments), `E-AWARENESS-TENANTS-EVOLVE-NOT-COLLAPSE-1` (why α is a diagnostic), `spo_anaphora_nibble` (the shipped rule v1 mirrors), `E-SURFACE-FORM-COLLAPSE-1` (the nominal/verbal role split), `E-FREQ-IS-COSINE-REPLACEMENT-1` (the metric). Out-of-scope dimensions (runbook/qualia/meaning-level/contradiction/MODAL/LOKAL) were declared, not faked.

## 2026-07-21 — E-AWARENESS-TENANTS-EVOLVE-NOT-COLLAPSE-1 — operator ruling: the 32 awareness tenants EVOLVE, they do not collapse; jc substrate_compare is a permanent agreement-DIAGNOSTIC (parity witness), never an N→1 collapse trigger — supersedes the M20 §3 "collapse gate" framing for awareness

**Status:** FINDING (operator ruling, this session). **Confidence:** High — direct operator statement: *"they will not collapse they just will evolve and if you would do a great job you would know that"*, on top of *"we start with redundancy because we have 32 tenants so we can afford to measure with jc crate later."* **Scope:** the awareness-tenant family (M20 A-series), NOT the ENTROPY-MILESTONES N→1 dedup ledger (which remains valid for *accidental* type duplication — a different thing).

**The correction.** The ENTROPY-MILESTONES "systematic N→1 collapse" is for removing accidental duplicate TYPES. It was mis-imported onto the awareness tenants, which are FUNCTIONAL diversity: a permanent diverse-redundancy substrate (the MySQL-oracle-never-retired pattern — parity witnesses kept forever). Each tenant reading carries its own NARS truth + plasticity and is written back in place by the **owning ractor** (mailbox-as-owner: Rust move + the actor model prove single-writer / no-alias at *compile time*, E-CE64-MB-4 — NOT a gated BUNDLE/XOR merge, which is the shared-BindSpace-era mechanism for *racing* writers; V3 has no multi-writer contention on a tenant lane, so the standing wave's revision is just the owner's exclusive in-place write) → it EVOLVES per version, per revision, toward but never reaching the φ-1 humility ceiling. A pair that is high-α (redundant) *today* can diverge *tomorrow* as the readings evolve; collapsing on a stationary snapshot would destroy exactly the capacity to diverge that makes the substrate learn. The Click's own loop (`awareness.revise(key, outcome)` → `global_context += fact` reshapes the next cycle) has no terminal collapse state by construction.

**Consequence for M20 §3.** The `jc::reliability` battery (Cronbach α / ICC / Spearman / Pearson) stays — but as a **diagnostic that certifies inter-tenant agreement/divergence over time**, NOT a collapse trigger. Divergence is signal, not waste; no lane is ever deleted. The "measured awareness width" becomes a "measured agreement SNAPSHOT" that itself evolves. Significance still per I-NOISE-FLOOR-JIRAK. The plan §3 collapse wording is annotated as superseded in place (not deleted — plan hygiene), pointing here.

**Cross-ref:** plan `.claude/plans/soa-32-tenant-awareness-redundancy-v1.md` §3 (annotated), §2 (A8/A9 carved as evolving members), `E-MARKOV-TEMPORAL-STREAM-1` (the temporal substrate the wave writes over), The Click P-1 (the perpetual-revision loop). Cheap-lesson: "N→1 collapse" and "permanent diverse-redundancy that evolves" are OPPOSITE operations — never apply the dedup ledger to a learning substrate.

The §0.5 escalation-ECONOMICS sub-claim KILLS: removing the lag-1 witness raised coincidental pairs' mid-rung persistence, dropping the pruning fraction **0.458 → 0.333 < 0.40** (gate 3a). This is REPORTED as a KILL, NOT retuned — `MIN_PRUNED`/`THETA_ESCALATE`/fixture are byte-identical; part of v4's "cheap escalation" figure was a witness artifact. The cascade still PRESERVES separation (3b green); only the cheapness number failed. Net: the standing-wave/orientation/width claim promotes PROVISIONAL → VALIDATED-IN-SCOPE (leg 1); the economics figure is DEFERRED to its own follow-up (cascade redesign or a justified re-registration).

**Cross-ref:** E-CAUSAL-TISSUE-ALREADY-SHIPS-1 (the M1–M3 audit this answers), E-DCSW1-LEG1-GREEN (the v3/v4 entry whose economics figure is now corrected), plan §6.5, `E-MARKOV-TEMPORAL-STREAM-1` (leg-2 substrate). What STANDS: the fixture-ceiling escape, the persistence-fraction statistic, the cascade-prune-at-zero-cost result, the §0.5 economics. v5 fixes M1–M3 before the headline re-promotes.

## 2026-07-20 — E-MASK-SELECTION-ALGEBRA-1 — GraphQL ERGONOMICS reimagined as mask arithmetic over the existing ClassView × WideFieldMask surface, for the two hierarchies (part_of:is_a mereology · palette256² centroid): selection (rail walk + named views) + standing_mask (dirty ∩ interest) land as two additive zero-dep contract modules; NO query document, NO serde, NOTHING existing touched

**Status:** FINDING (built + tested — 19 new tests, contract lib green, clippy `-D warnings`/fmt clean). **Confidence:** High. Deliverables: `lance-graph-contract/src/{selection,standing_mask}.rs`. Operator rulings executed: the topic is *"GraphQL ergonomics over horizontal vs vertical — part_of:is_a mereology vs palette256² centroid; reimagine ADDITIVE classview/widefieldmask ergonomics"* + *"you can always use a bitmask and do nested classview fieldmask widefieldmask … much faster than your serialization"* (no materialized selection tree — nesting = masks keyed by view, recursion = the graph walk itself) + *"you cannot hijack existing ERB/Redmine FieldView pattern"* (the shipped `FieldView` struct / `render_rows` / `facet_rows` surface is the incumbent leaf; untouched) + the review verdict that GraphQL's features either collapse to bit arithmetic + classid dispatch, are already shipped under other names (`NodeDelta` = @defer/@stream; RBAC ∩ = auth directives), or are refused hijacks (per-field resolvers, mutations-in-selection).

**The two modules (each earns existence via a consumer path in the same PR's tests).** (1) `selection` — `ViewId`/`NamedView{class, mask, template}`/`ViewRegistry` (a named view IS a GraphQL fragment + persisted query: composition = `WideFieldMask::union`), + `RailGraph` trait + `walk_rails` (per node: resolve view by classid, AND `view.mask ∩ present_mask`, emit `(key, position)` in bit order for the EXISTING render path, follow set rail-bearing bits, recurse; cycle guard + max_depth). The walker is metric-agnostic: centroid-ranked (best-first) hop order is a consumer composition over the facet's own `distance()`/`hi_chain`/`lo_chain` — the ergonomic layer never re-models the metric. (2) `standing_mask` — subscriptions as standing interest masks: fires iff `dirty ∩ interest ≠ ∅`, ONE intersection per write, no re-query/diffing; `SubscriptionTable<K>` generic over key, Vec+linear-scan by design (consumers shard per mailbox/tenant).

**Load-bearing verification.** **Rail-ness is NOT derivable from the register** — `facet::CascadeShape` groups content-blind, `ReadMode` carries only `{tail_variant, value_schema, edge_codec}`, le-contract §2 slot-purity forbids byte-sniffing ⇒ rail knowledge enters via `RailGraph::rail_target` (dependency inversion like `PlannerContract`); zero `ClassView` changes.

**Dropped as out-of-scope (operator correction, recorded so it is not re-derived): the "prefix_select / scan pushdown" item.** Three successive shapes (a byte-order comparator with a V1 `family·identity` decode; a "content-blind tail" variant; a `FacetSelection` wrapper) were all rejected — each reinvented address machinery the substrate already owns. The key IS a `facet::FacetCascade` (`facet_classid(4) | 6×(8:8)`, tiers `HEEL·HIP·TWIG·LEAF·family·identity` — there is no separate "tail"); prefix containment/narrowing/disjointness ARE `FacetCascade::shared_prefix_tiles`/`prefix_distance`; the two hierarchies are its own `hi_chain` (part_of) / `lo_chain` (is_a); Morton/4⁴ lives on `FacetTier::morton`. A "selection" on the address side is just (facet prefix depth) — nothing to mint. GraphQL-ergonomics scope = the VALUE-side masks (this entry's two modules); the address side was never the assignment.

**Horizontal/vertical synergy (the operator's axis).** The two register readings are each other's missing instrument: rails (`part_of:is_a`) give vertical ladder moves a NAME; centroid pairs (256² + palette256 LUT / `distance()`, pre-Fisher-z) give horizontal sibling moves a METRIC. Vertical navigation is FREE (prefix arithmetic → `prefix_select`); horizontal costs a hop (→ `walk_rails`); the mask is the budget deciding which hops are paid. `FieldMask::inherit` is the is_a axis ON the masks (OR down = inheritance; OR across = part_of aggregation — one algebra, both axes). Best-first walks = rank set rail bits by `distance()` (consumer composition, walker stays metric-agnostic — Fisher-z correctness stays substrate-side). Standing masks split the same way: prefix watch (vertical) vs field-interest (horizontal) — a prefix IS a mask over the key register as FieldMask is over the value register; the node is one 4096-bit register masked at two levels. V3-migration ergonomics: substrate versions swap under `RailGraph` impls; version differences become VIEW differences (a named-view recipe), never call-site `if v3`; same interest mask on parallel substrates = a free migration parity witness (diverging fire-sets = parity violation at write time).

**Cross-ref:** E-MARKOV-TEMPORAL-STREAM-1 (episodic basins = `part_of:is_a` rails; L4 palette tenant), E-V3-FACET-4-PLUS-12 + le-contract §2/§3 (content-blind register, slot purity), D-BOTHCASC (one address, two cascades — extended here from addressing to traversal), `class_view::{FieldMask::inherit, WideFieldMask}`, `hhtl::NiblePath`, a2ui `NodeDelta` (the shipped @defer/@stream), OGAR #220-arc teardown (the serialization reflex this replaces).

## 2026-07-20 — E-MORTON-CASCADE-V3-1 — the thinking-engine→P64→cognitive-shader-driver compute, reimagined as a CLEAN V3 Morton-cascade Fisher-z read over the full-resolution 3×256² SPO + 3×256² AriGraph L4 tenant — NOT the cluttered V1 CausalEdge64 over V3; keep-old + add-v3 + LazyLock dispatch + compare

**Status:** ⊘ DOWNGRADED to CONJECTURE (operator-ordered 2026-07-20; applied 2026-07-21 via E-DCSW1-LEG1-GREEN's supersession note after the #775 vehicle closed unmerged) — tautology tests over a synthetic table; Morton cell computed and discarded; ClassView-ungated. **Confidence:** Low. Deliverable: `crates/bgz-tensor/src/morton_cascade/{mod,v3,legacy}.rs`. Operator: *"consolidate/refactor … into Morton Cascade inverse pyramid 4×4 centroid pairwise distribution Fisher-z for V3 … using cluttered V1 causaledge64 over v3 substrate is extremely poor design … keep the old and add a `_v3` … compare its results … lazylock dispatch."* Executes ENTROPY-MILESTONES M4/D-MTS-4 (L4 palette tenants over Morton 2bit×2bit) + M20 (CausalEdge64 demoted) + COMPONENT-MAP §6 (BindSpace-hung p64-bridge call-site path RETIRES).

**The reimagining (confirmed from layout).** `CausalEdge64` = two ladders on SPO content: **Pearl 2³ CausalMask** (3-bit, the 8-way conditioning ladder None→…→SPO=Counterfactual) × **NARS rung** (i4 signed inference mantissa, bits 46-49) + truth (freq/conf), with **SPO = 3×8 bare palette indices** (bits 0-23). Each SPO role is ONE centroid index — no pairwise relation. **Reimagined:** SPO = **3×256² true-centroid PAIRS** — each role a `(a,b)` point in the 256×256 pairwise centroid distribution (a *relation* the `FisherZTable` scores), living in the node's L4 palette tenant (`6×(u8:u8)` = 3 SPO + 3 AriGraph-basin), NOT crammed in the 64-bit edge.

**The clean V3 compute (a WIRING of shipped pieces, no new codec).** `v3::read` scores each SPO pair's own `(a,b)` via `FisherZTable::lookup_f32` (fact coherence) and each AriGraph/episodic basin pair's BOTH centroids against ALL SPO centroids (basin support) over the Morton 2bit×2bit inverse-pyramid cell order; net<0 ⇒ irony/sarcasm (qualia −8..+8 inversion). Pieces: `bgz-tensor::fisher_z::FisherZTable` (256×256 pairwise, shipped) + Morton `morton2` (mirrors `perturbation-sim::splat`) + `bgz17` 256-palette.

**Keep-old + dispatch + compare (measured cost of V1-over-V3).** `legacy::read` is the V1 `3×8` bare-index path — it reads each pair as the degenerate `(a,a)` (the `b`/AriGraph half is structurally invisible). `BACKEND` (LazyLock, default V3; `BGZ_MORTON_BACKEND=legacy` overrides) dispatches; `compare()` runs both. Measured: `v3_sees_pairwise_that_legacy_cannot` (diverges when `b` carries signal) + `v3_and_legacy_agree_on_the_degenerate_diagonal` (`a==b` ⇒ V3 collapses to V1) — i.e. V1-over-V3 loses exactly the full-resolution pairwise/AriGraph half, quantified.

**Next (staged):** wire `cognitive-shader-driver` to call `morton_cascade::read` over the MailboxSoA L4 tenant (replacing the BindSpace-hung p64-bridge path); the M8 four-engine collapse + M9-REOPENED 3 style tables are separate slices. Additive: new module + board only. **Cross-ref:** E-P64-V3-ONE-SUBSTRATE-JC (the "absorb compute into V3" verdict this realizes), E-CAUSALEDGE-V3-96-STAGED-1 (the SPO-referenced edge), M4/M8/M20 (ENTROPY-MILESTONES), `.claude/v3/COMPONENT-MAP.md` §3/§6.

## 2026-07-20 — E-CAUSALEDGE-BIT49-UNIFIED — the bit-49 inference-mantissa disunification is CLOSED: causal-edge exposes a canonical layout-agnostic `inference()`/`set_inference()`; every consumer migrated off the deprecated `inference_type()` + `#[allow(deprecated)]`

**Status:** FINDING (built + tested; causal-edge green under BOTH v2-default AND v1 no-default, clippy-clean; planner nars_engine 19/19; p64-bridge clippy-clean under -D warnings). **Confidence:** High. Operator: *"causaledge64 always has a little endian schema warning around bit 49 about mantissa changes not unified across all consuming crates."* This is the FIX (complements the E-NEURAL-DEBUG-BIT49-RULE detector).

**The root cause (re-grounded).** `inference_mantissa()` is **v2-only** (`#[cfg(feature = "causal-edge-v2-layout")]`), so consumers could NOT "just call inference_mantissa()" (breaks v1 builds). The deprecated `inference_type()` was actually the layout-agnostic accessor (v2: decode 4-bit signed mantissa incl. bit-49 sign via `from_mantissa`; v1: 3-bit read) — deprecated only as an API *nudge*, forcing every consumer to sprinkle `#[allow(deprecated)]`. THAT scattering is the "not unified across consuming crates" the operator named.

**The unification.** Added a canonical, **non-deprecated** `CausalEdge64::inference()` + `set_inference()` (the same layout-branched body); `inference_type()`/`set_inference_type()` now DELEGATE to them (behaviourally identical, `inference_type` keeps its `#[deprecated]` as a back-compat shim). Migrated every real consumer onto the canonical accessor and dropped the now-unnecessary `#[allow(deprecated)]`:
- `lance-graph-planner/src/cache/nars_engine.rs:526` (`from_causal_edge`, `#[allow(deprecated)]` removed + comment retrimmed) + the two round-trip test sites (removed the test's unnecessary allow);
- `p64-bridge/src/lib.rs:63` (`edge_to_layer_mask`);
- `causal-edge/src/network.rs:211` (`set_inference`);
- `lance-graph/tests/intervene_counterfactual.rs:133,165`.

**Not migrated (correctly):** `pearl_junction.rs` `inference_type()` is PearlJunction's OWN method (returns `Option<InferenceType>`), not CausalEdge64 — a false positive the neural-debug rule's receiver-token capture distinguishes. `temporal()` call-sites (nars_engine test, network.rs sort) are a SEPARATE deprecated-accessor concern (v2 reclaim zone), left under their `#[allow(deprecated)]` — out of scope for the bit-49 inference unification. After this, the E-NEURAL-DEBUG-BIT49-RULE scanner finds ZERO production `inference_type()` hits.

**Cross-ref:** E-NEURAL-DEBUG-BIT49-RULE (the detector), I-LEGACY-API-FEATURE-GATED instance #2 (the original finding), `causal_edge::edge::{inference, set_inference, inference_type (deprecated shim), inference_mantissa (v2-only)}`.

## 2026-07-20 — E-NEURAL-DEBUG-BIT49-RULE — neural-debug scanner rule for the bit-49 CausalEdge64 inference-mantissa disunification (wiring increment B of the operator's 4-part selection)

**Status:** FINDING (built + tested, clippy/fmt-clean). **Confidence:** High. Deliverable: `crates/neural-debug/src/scanner.rs` (`scan_legacy_inference` + `find_legacy_inference_in_source` + `LegacyInferenceHit`, exported from `lib.rs`). Operator: *"causaledge64 always has a little endian schema warning around bit 49 about mantissa changes not unified across all consuming crates"* + the 4-wiring selection (this is B).

**The rule.** A static call-site detector (heuristic, like the existing stub/NaN detectors) flagging `<recv>.inference_type()` / `<recv>.set_inference_type(` — the deprecated v1 3-bit read of `CausalEdge64` bits 46-48 — that should route through the unified `inference_mantissa()` + `InferenceType::from_mantissa()` (v2 4-bit SIGNED mantissa, sign at **bit 49**). Captures the receiver token (so `PearlJunction::inference_type` false positives are filterable) and whether an `#[allow(deprecated)]` silences it within the SAME function (boundary-stopped backward scan) — the silenced-but-still-disunified case the operator named.

**Confirmed real disunification sites (the rule targets these):** `lance-graph-planner/src/cache/nars_engine.rs:526` (`edge.inference_type() as u8`, under `#[allow(deprecated)]`), `:1047`/`:1052` (test call-sites), `p64-bridge/src/lib.rs:63` (`edge.inference_type() as u8`). All read the enum discriminant, LOSING the signed mantissa (bit 49) that `Counterfactual` (-6) vs `Intervention` (+6) rely on. `SpoHead.inference` is typed `u8` "0-7" — the un-unified schema.

**Scope note.** The rule targets `inference_type`/`set_inference_type` (unambiguously CausalEdge64-deprecated); it deliberately does NOT flag `.temporal()`/`.set_temporal()` (ambiguous — `CausalEdgeV3`, `MailboxSoA`, `HighHeel` have their own, non-deprecated). The actual cross-crate UNIFICATION (routing every consumer onto the mantissa API + retyping `SpoHead.inference`) is a SEPARATE change — this rule makes the disunification mechanically detectable first. **Cross-ref:** I-LEGACY-API-FEATURE-GATED instance #2, E-P64-V3-ONE-SUBSTRATE-JC (wiring increments 1+2), `causal_edge::edge::{inference_type (deprecated), inference_mantissa, InferenceType::from_mantissa}`.

## 2026-07-20 — E-P64-V3-ONE-SUBSTRATE-JC — RETRACTION + jc-driven verdict: the "hybrid is the native shape" framing was tech-debt-as-feature (operator-rejected); the honest on-demand comparison MEASURES an asymmetry — V3 absorbs P64's compute at 0 new bytes, P64 replicating V3 costs the whole 32-byte key+edge layer — so the verdict is ONE SUBSTRATE (V3), absorb P64's compute as a method on the node; NOT keep-both

**Status:** FINDING (built + measured, jc-driven, KILL-gated on-demand; example clippy/fmt-clean). **Confidence:** High. Deliverable: `crates/jc/examples/substrate_compare.rs` (jc dev-deps `p64` + `lance-graph-contract` + `neural-debug`; production JC stays zero-dep). Operator: *"I don't like the implicit hybrid at all — it's claiming technical debt as a feature. JC-crate driven comparison on demand (hybrid) vs P64 (what would we need to replicate V3) vs V3 (what is missing in V3 and how to shape it)"* + *"the hybrid is the demand."*

**RETRACTION.** `E-P64-V3-SUBSTRATE-PROJECTIONS-1` concluded "hybrid is the substrate's native shape, not a bridge between two carriers." The operator rejected this: coexisting p64+V3 representations are a **disunification**, and calling it "native" rebrands tech debt as a feature. The byte-level FACT that finding measured (p64's 64×64 matrix and V3's key|edges|value are the same 512 bytes, zero-copy) STANDS. Its VERDICT ("keep both / hybrid") is retracted and replaced by the asymmetry below.

**The hybrid is the demand.** "Hybrid" is NOT an architecture — it is the on-demand comparison ACT. Running the jc probe IS the hybrid: it exercises both projections of one real node only to MEASURE two gaps, then the asymmetry picks ONE substrate.

**Measured (real types, on-demand):** a real `NodeGuid` (classid 0x0202_0002 → routes=true) + a real `HeelPlanes::from_clam_seed(&value[0..34]).expand().attend(query,32)` seeded from the node's OWN value tenant (best_idx=34):
- **V3 arm — "what's missing, how to shape it":** V3 lacks the compute ops (64×64 BNN attention, POPCNT lookup, phyllotactic expansion) — but adding them costs **0 new storage bytes**: attention is a READING of the value tenant the node already owns (proven: real attend ran with zero new node allocation).
- **P64 arm — "what to replicate V3":** P64 (`rows:[u64;64]`, no key) must ADD the entire addressing layer to route/version/persist — **32 new bytes** (key 16 + edges 16) + prefix-radix routing it has none of (classid routing, cascade key, family/identity, edge block, tenant carving, temporal/anaphora, Lance persistence).
- **Asymmetry: 0 ≪ 32.**

**Verdict.** ONE SUBSTRATE = **V3**, with P64's compute **absorbed as a method on the node** (attention over the value tenant), NOT two parallel carriers and NOT P64-replicates-V3. The only real conversion left is the edge sub-register `CausalEdge64 ↔ CausalEdgeV3` (thinking-preserving, #766). This closes the disunification instead of blessing it.

**Wiring (operator-selected, all four).** (1) jc example [DONE, this entry]; (2) records into `neural_debug::registry()` (`record_row(0,Alive)` = V3-absorbs arm, `record_row(1,Static)` = P64-replicate gap) so `diag()`/`snapshot_rows()` surface it [DONE]; (3) reuse `POST /v1/shader/probe` (no new endpoint — lab-vs-canonical) [QUEUED, follow-up PR]; (4) neural-debug scanner rule flagging the bit-49 deprecated-`inference_type()` disunification [QUEUED, follow-up PR]. **Cross-ref:** E-P64-V3-SUBSTRATE-PROJECTIONS-1 (retracted verdict; byte-fact retained), E-CAUSALEDGE-V3-96-STAGED-1/-COMPARE-DRIVER-1 (the edge seam), `ndarray/crates/p64::{HeelPlanes,Palette64}`, `lance_graph_contract::canonical_node::NodeGuid`, `neural_debug::registry`.

## 2026-07-20 — E-P64-V3-SUBSTRATE-PROJECTIONS-1-CORR — gate-4 correction: the substrate probe's "amputation is real" KILL gate was VACUOUS (hardcoded `false` booleans → a gate that can never fail); replaced with a genuinely-measured "independent addressability" gate

**Status:** CORRECTION to E-P64-V3-SUBSTRATE-PROJECTIONS-1 (the core finding — p64 and V3 are two projections of ONE 512-byte node, zero-copy boundary — is UNCHANGED and still measured by gates 1/2/3/5). **Confidence:** High. Deliverable: `crates/deepnsm/examples/substrate_projection_compare.rs` gate 4.

**The defect.** The original gate 4 read `let p64_only_can_route = false; let v3_only_runs_attention = false; if p64_only_can_route || v3_only_runs_attention || !hybrid_does_both { fail }` — the two booleans were hardcoded constants, so that portion of the condition could never trip. A KILL gate that cannot kill is false assurance (worse than no gate). All CI on #767 was green because CI compiles the example but examples' runtime KILL gates are not executed by `cargo test` — the vacuity was invisible to CI.

**The fix.** Gate 4 now measures a REAL, falsifiable substrate property on a fresh node: (a) a VALUE-body write moves its p64 matrix row (compute reads the shared bytes) — can fail if backing isn't shared; (b) that same write does NOT disturb the classid route (readings are independent) — can fail if the projections alias semantically; (c) zeroing the classid drops `v3_routes()` to the unrouted default rung (the route is key-addressed, not value-addressed) — can fail if routing read the wrong bytes. This is a STRONGER claim than the vacuous "amputation" booleans: the compute reading and the address reading are orthogonal, independently-addressable views of one backing array. The "amputation" wording survives only as the capability argument in the printed comparison table, not as an asserted gate result.

**Process note (what to carry forward).** deepnsm probes are EXAMPLES; `cargo test` compiles them but does not RUN their KILL gates, so a vacuous runtime gate passes CI silently. Future substrate probes whose gates must be CI-enforced should live in `tests/` (integration test) or a lib `#[test]`, not an example — flagged for the next probe, not retrofitted here. Cross-ref: E-P64-V3-SUBSTRATE-PROJECTIONS-1 (the finding this hardens), operator directive "fix 767 and create PR."

## 2026-07-20 — E-P64-V3-SUBSTRATE-PROJECTIONS-1 — "wire lance-graph via p64 vs V3 vs hybrid" is a FALSE trichotomy: p64 (Palette64, the 64×64 BNN attention matrix) and V3 (classid `key(16)|edges(16)|value(480)`) are TWO PROJECTIONS of the SAME 512-byte SoA node, so the boundary between them is a zero-copy reinterpret (a write through V3-value is seen by the p64 matrix; the V3 HEEL bytes ARE p64's attention seed row) — HYBRID is the substrate's native shape, and the only real conversion in the whole wiring is the edge sub-register (CausalEdge64↔V3), already proven thinking-preserving

**Status:** FINDING (built + measured, KILL-gated 5/5, clippy/fmt-clean). **Confidence:** High. Deliverable: `crates/deepnsm/examples/substrate_projection_compare.rs` (std-only, zero-dep, deterministic). Operator: *"would it Resonate to wire Lance-graph via P64 parameter vs V3 Parameter vs hybrid and compare substrate."*

**The reframe (the crux).** p64 and V3 are NOT competing carriers to choose between. Grounded in source: `ndarray/crates/p64` = `Palette64`, a **64×64 BNN attention matrix = 4096 bits = 512 bytes = 8 cache lines** (`Q AND K >> Γ` attention in one instruction, POPCNT palette lookup) — the COMPUTE projection. V3's canonical node = `key(16)|edges(16)|value(480)` = **512 bytes** — the ADDRESS projection. They are the **same 512-byte block read two ways**. This is the OGAR canon verbatim ("the key prerenders nodes with zero value decode; Lance may compress the value"): the V3 key's HEEL/HIP/TWIG cascade tiers coincide with p64's top attention rows.

**Measured (one 512-byte node, both projections):**
- **Both contracts hold at once:** classid `0x0202_0002` routes AND the 64×64 matrix yields valid `attn(0,1)` ∈ [0,64]. `row0 = 0x0000BEEF_02020002` — the classid (low 4 B) and HEEL `0xBEEF` (bytes 4-5) literally sit inside p64 attention row 0.
- **Zero-copy shared backing:** a write through the V3 value projection (`set_v3_value_byte(0,0xAB)`) is observed by the p64 matrix projection (`p64_row(4) & 0xFF == 0xAB`) — one backing array, not two copies. A copy would have hidden it.
- **Cascade↔attention resonance:** changing the V3 HEEL changes p64 row 0's bits 32-47 to the same value — the ADDRESS is the compute SEED.
- **Amputation is real:** p64-only exposes no classid (a matrix has no key → cannot route); V3-only never invokes the attention contract (bytes present, compute un-run); HYBRID reads both. Boundary copy = **0 bytes** (accessors slice the one backing).

**The verdict.** HYBRID resonates — and not as a compromise. Wiring "via p64 only" amputates routing/versioning/storage; "via V3 only" leaves the attention matrix un-materialized; the substrate's native shape is BOTH-at-once because they share one zero-copy backing. The boundary is a reinterpret, not a serialize — a 0-friction boundary (convergence-architect sense). The ONLY real conversion in the entire wiring is the edge sub-register `CausalEdge64` u64 ↔ `CausalEdgeV3` 96-bit, and #766's harness already proved THAT is thinking-preserving. So the hybrid's single seam is measured-lossless; everything else is byte-shared. **What this means for the MailboxSoA cut-over:** don't pick a carrier — the row IS both; wire the compute path (edge sweep, NarsTables, BNN attention) through the p64 reading and the address/storage/temporal path through the V3 reading of the same bytes, converting only at the edge sub-register. Additive: example + board only. **Cross-ref:** E-CAUSALEDGE-V3-96-STAGED-1 + E-CAUSALEDGE-V3-COMPARE-DRIVER-1 (the edge seam, proven lossless), the CANON node `key(16)|edges(16)|value(480)`, `ndarray/crates/p64::Palette64`, OGAR "key prerenders with zero value decode" + 256×256 centroid-tile canon, `p64-bridge` (CausalEdge64+bgz17→CognitiveShader, the existing hybrid seam).

## 2026-07-20 — E-CAUSALEDGE-V3-COMPARE-DRIVER-1 — the staged V3 lift is thinking-preserving on the DRIVER'S REAL emission recipe, and it recovers a LIVE latent bug: `driver.rs` [5] passes `h.cycle_index` as `CausalEdge64::pack`'s `temporal` arg, which the v2 layout SILENTLY DROPS — the exact reason `MailboxSoA` keeps a standalone `current_cycle` column; `CausalEdgeV3`'s TE byte folds it back into the edge

**Status:** FINDING (built + tested in `cognitive-shader-driver`, 3/3 green; module fmt- and clippy-clean, builds warning-free). **Confidence:** High. Deliverable: `crates/cognitive-shader-driver/src/edge_v3_compare.rs` (+ `lib.rs` wiring) — additive, read-only, touches NO hot-loop code and stores NO new column. Operator: *"migrate staged, keep causaledge64 in parallel and compare thinking"* + *"causaledge64 should be in lance-graph cognitive-shader-driver."* Follow-on to E-CAUSALEDGE-V3-96-STAGED-1 (the type) — this is the first `cognitive-shader-driver`-side comparison, the wedge before the `MailboxSoA` column cut-over.

**The live finding (the crux).** The driver's [5] edge emission (`driver.rs` ~483-494) packs `(h.cycle_index & 0xFFF)` as `CausalEdge64::pack`'s `temporal` argument — but under the shipping v2 layout that write is a **no-op** (`I-LEGACY-API-FEATURE-GATED`: bits 52-63 were reclaimed for W-slot/lens/spare). So the cycle index the driver computes is **silently discarded** by the edge. This is precisely why `mailbox_soa.rs:110-115` keeps a **standalone `current_cycle` column** to compensate ("the v2 CausalEdge64 layout reclaimed the old temporal bits … so the edge cannot carry it"). The workaround is load-bearing *because of* the drop.

**Proven WITHOUT calling the deprecated accessor.** `v3_carries_temporal_that_v2_drops` packs two edges differing ONLY in the temporal arg (cycle 5 vs 900) and asserts `e_early.0 == e_late.0` — byte-identical, i.e. v2 drops it — then shows their V3 lifts (`lift_emitted`, TE = `cycle & 0x7F`) are DISTINCT and round-trip the cycle (`v3.temporal() == 5` / `900&0x7F`). No `edge.temporal()` call (that is `#[deprecated]` under v2 and would fail `-D warnings`); the byte-equality IS the drop proof.

**The compare-thinking result on real emission.** `v3_thinking_preserved_on_driver_emission` reproduces the driver's [5] recipe EXACTLY (same resonance→f/c, same `row%256`/`(row/4)%256` S/O palettes, same `resonance<0.2` filter → 4 of 5 hits survive) and asserts across all 16 premise pairs that the V3 lift (SPO dropped, `rehydrate`d from the node) syllogizes IDENTICALLY to the v1 edge. The SPO dedup is thinking-preserving on live-shaped edges, not just the unit fixtures — and `thinking_preserved()` is now a reusable predicate for the eventual column cut-over.

**Why this is the right first cognitive-shader-driver step.** It delivers the operator's "compare thinking" on the ACTUAL emission path with zero hot-loop risk (a new module + one `pub mod` line), and it surfaces the concrete payoff for the next staged PR — a per-row `edges_v3` register that carries per-edge causal metadata the v2 edge cannot. That column cut-over is its own gated PR (`v3-envelope-auditor` for the `+N×12 B` layout add, `v3-mailbox-warden` for the write-on-behalf ownership), NOT done here.
